verses.text: The angel at Bochim rebukes them for not destroying the altars. Bochim. God reproves their compromise.
The angel at Bochim rebukes them for not destroying the altars. Bochim. God reproves their compromise.
The angel at Bochim rebukes them for not destroying the altars. Bochim. God reproves their compromise.
The people weep and sacrifice. Weeping. They mourn their failure.
The people weep and sacrifice. Weeping. They mourn their failure.
Joshua dies, and so does that faithful generation. The passing. A faithful age ends.
Joshua dies, and so does that faithful generation. The passing. A faithful age ends.
Joshua dies, and so does that faithful generation. The passing. A faithful age ends.
Joshua dies, and so does that faithful generation. The passing. A faithful age ends.
A new generation arises that knew not the LORD, and serves Baal. Forgotten. Faith was not passed on.
A new generation arises that knew not the LORD, and serves Baal. Forgotten. Faith was not passed on.
A new generation arises that knew not the LORD, and serves Baal. Forgotten. Faith was not passed on.
A new generation arises that knew not the LORD, and serves Baal. Forgotten. Faith was not passed on.
God gives them to spoilers; they are sore distressed. Distress. Sin brings trouble.
God gives them to spoilers; they are sore distressed. Distress. Sin brings trouble.
God raises judges, but they will not hearken. The judges. Deliverers are sent.
God raises judges, but they will not hearken. The judges. Deliverers are sent.
When the judge dies, they turn back worse than before. Relapse. The cycle repeats.
When the judge dies, they turn back worse than before. Relapse. The cycle repeats.
God leaves the nations to prove Israel. Proving. Trials test their faith.
God leaves the nations to prove Israel. Proving. Trials test their faith.
